ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "year_of_construction" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "n_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "h_floor" REAL /* Height of each floor in meters */,
  "a_leas" INTEGER /* Total leased area in square meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., heavy, light) */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the building */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the building */,
  "building_age" INTEGER /* Age of the building */,
  "building_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the building (e.g., new, renovated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type (e.g., heavy, light) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building consuming energy */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy being consumed (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy consumption (e.g., kWh, m3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_type FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance being performed (e.g., HVAC, plumbing) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance schedule */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Time of the maintenance schedule */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_maintenance_type FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_type") REFERENCES maintenance_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type (e.g., HVAC, plumbing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work order */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building for which the work order is created */,
  "work_order_date" TEXT /* Date the work order was created */,
  "work_order_time" TEXT /* Time the work order was created */,
  "work_order_status" TEXT /* Status of the work order (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician assigned to the work order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_assigned_technician FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_technician") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_work_order_status FOREIGN KEY ("work_order_status") REFERENCES work_order_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the work order status (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the equipment is installed */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., HVAC, plumbing) */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "equipment_installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_type FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_type") REFERENCES equipment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_manufacturer") REFERENCES vendor ("vendor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type (e.g., HVAC, plumbing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, building manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., administrator, building manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view energy consumption, edit equipment information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_energy_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy efficiency record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being rated */,
  "energy_rating" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "certificate_date" TEXT /* Date the energy efficiency certificate was issued */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_energy_efficiency_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy audit */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the energy audit was performed */,
  "audit_findings" TEXT /* Findings of the energy audit */,
  "audit_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the energy audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_audits_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the technician (e.g., HVAC, plumbing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)
